subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved servant of God! The Blessed Beauty is the Sun of Truth, resplendent in His dawning, luminous in the firmament, manifest throughout creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اللهک سوگلی قلی جمال مبارک شمس حقیقت در بدر منیردر نیر اثیردر ممکنات مظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @education and the development of capacity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
